list.name: run_id
list.label: Runs (merged)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM drive_state ORDER BY run_id DESC

options.content:
**Merged-run view.** When multiple runs are selected, each candidate appears once: its row from the run with the best status wins (priority: `ok` > `ok_after_relock` > `flaky` > `not_reproducible`). Classifications join on the winning run's `run_id`.

**RQ1** Reproducibility rate · **RQ2** Breaking rate · **RQ3** Temporal variation · **RQ4** Failure-mode taxonomy.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT candidate_key) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT candidate_key) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})), winning AS (SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winning), 1) AS pct FROM winning GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})), winning AS (SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM winning), 1) AS pct FROM winning GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ1 — Per-run contribution to merged set

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT run_id AS winning_run, COUNT(*) AS candidates, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reproducible FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY candidates DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT run_id AS winning_run, COUNT(*) AS candidates, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reproducible FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY candidates DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Breaking vs non-breaking (over reproducible cohort)

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Patch bumps: breaking vs non-breaking

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='patch' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='patch' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Minor bumps: breaking vs non-breaking

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='minor' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='minor' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Major bumps: breaking vs non-breaking

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='major' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='major' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.dep_name AS dependency, COUNT(*) AS breaking_prs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.previous_version || '→' || e.new_version) AS sample_bumps FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.category='breaking' GROUP BY e.dep_name HAVING breaking_prs >= 2 ORDER BY breaking_prs DESC LIMIT 25
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, entry_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT e.dep_name AS dependency, COUNT(*) AS breaking_prs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.previous_version || '→' || e.new_version) AS sample_bumps FROM ranked d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.rn = 1 AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.category='breaking' GROUP BY e.dep_name HAVING breaking_prs >= 2 ORDER BY breaking_prs DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: RQ3 — Reproducibility rate over time (monthly, merged)

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS reproducibility_pct FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS reproducibility_pct FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, COUNT(*) AS candidates FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, COUNT(*) AS candidates FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time

panels.title: RQ3 — ok / not_reproducible split over time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN status='not_reproducible' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_reproducible FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN status='not_reproducible' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_reproducible FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT candidate_key, status, commit_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

panels.title: RQ4 — Failure-mode taxonomy (merged, classifications from winning run)

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT c.category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ranked r JOIN drive_state_classifications c ON c.run_id = r.run_id AND c.candidate_key = r.candidate_key WHERE r.rn = 1 AND r.status = 'not_reproducible' GROUP BY c.category ORDER BY count DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT c.category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ranked r JOIN drive_state_classifications c ON c.run_id = r.run_id AND c.candidate_key = r.candidate_key WHERE r.rn = 1 AND r.status = 'not_reproducible' GROUP BY c.category ORDER BY count DESC

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT COALESCE(c.subcategory, '(no E-code)') AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ranked r JOIN drive_state_classifications c ON c.run_id = r.run_id AND c.candidate_key = r.candidate_key WHERE r.rn = 1 AND r.status = 'not_reproducible' AND c.category = 'RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY c.subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT COALESCE(c.subcategory, '(no E-code)') AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ranked r JOIN drive_state_classifications c ON c.run_id = r.run_id AND c.candidate_key = r.candidate_key WHERE r.rn = 1 AND r.status = 'not_reproducible' AND c.category = 'RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY c.subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT CASE WHEN c.category IN ('NIGHTLY_REQUIRED','REPO_GONE','TIMEOUT','RUNTIME_CRASH','TEST_FAILURE','MSRV_TOO_LOW') THEN 'corpus property' WHEN c.category IN ('NATIVE_DEP_MISSING','LOCK_FILE_STALE','OPENSSL_MISMATCH','DEPENDENCY_RESOLUTION') THEN 'pipeline-fixable' WHEN c.category='RUSTC_BITROT' THEN 'mixed (era-routing)' ELSE 'other' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked r JOIN drive_state_classifications c ON c.run_id = r.run_id AND c.candidate_key = r.candidate_key WHERE r.rn = 1 AND r.status = 'not_reproducible' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT run_id, candidate_key, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY candidate_key ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ok' THEN 0 WHEN 'ok_after_relock' THEN 1 WHEN 'flaky' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_reproducible' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, run_id) AS rn FROM drive_state WHERE run_id IN (${run_id:singlequote})) SELECT CASE WHEN c.category IN ('NIGHTLY_REQUIRED','REPO_GONE','TIMEOUT','RUNTIME_CRASH','TEST_FAILURE','MSRV_TOO_LOW') THEN 'corpus property' WHEN c.category IN ('NATIVE_DEP_MISSING','LOCK_FILE_STALE','OPENSSL_MISMATCH','DEPENDENCY_RESOLUTION') THEN 'pipeline-fixable' WHEN c.category='RUSTC_BITROT' THEN 'mixed (era-routing)' ELSE 'other' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ranked r JOIN drive_state_classifications c ON c.run_id = r.run_id AND c.candidate_key = r.candidate_key WHERE r.rn = 1 AND r.status = 'not_reproducible' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY n DESC
